allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: reliability improvements, dynamic PPTX theming, and dev skills

Backend fixes & reliability:
- Fix API route mismatch: router now mounts at /api/v1 via settings.API_V1_STR
- Fix duplicate created_at key in get_job_status response
- Add CORS middleware with configurable CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS setting
- Add failed_step + error_message columns to Job model with DB indexes on status/created_at
- Configure DB connection pool \(pool_size, max_overflow, pool_pre_ping\)
- Add async timeouts to dual-research and triple-analysis gather calls
- Add retry logic with tenacity \(exponential backoff\) to all external API calls
- Replace all print\(\) statements with structured logging throughout backend
- Fix temp PPTX path to use tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile \(cross-platform safe\)
- Graceful Perplexity degradation: job continues with Gemini-only if key is invalid
- Surface failed_step and error_message in /api/v1/jobs/{id} status response
- Move all hardcoded model names and config into settings \(GPT_MODEL, GEMINI_MODEL, etc.\)
- Pin all dependency versions in requirements.txt; add tenacity==9.0.0

Frontend fixes:
- Fix all API URLs from /api/* to /api/v1/* across JobForm, StatusDashboard, ResultsView
- Adaptive polling backoff in StatusDashboard \(2s → 4s → … → 30s cap\)
- Show failed_step and error_message in the failure UI card

Dynamic PPTX design:
- Replace generate_pptx\(\) with brand-adaptive themed renderer
- Add _derive_theme\(\): maps industry \(25+ keywords\) → color palette and tone modifiers
- Title slide: accent sidebar, brand name, rule, large title, subtitle, URL
- Content slides: accent stripe header, pip bullets, footer watermark
- Hooks slide: alternating primary/secondary callout boxes with edge stripes
- Next Steps slide: content layout + channel pills row at bottom
- Pass questionnaire to generate_pptx\(\) from workflow.py for theme derivation

Dev skills \(/.claude/commands/\):
- /dev — start/restart full local stack \(backend + frontend + Docker check\)
- /run-job — submit and poll a job end-to-end from the CLI
- /check-job — inspect a specific job or list recent jobs from DB
- /test-pptx — instant themed PPTX preview without calling GPT-4o
- /logs — tail and filter backend logs by job ID or level
- /add-industry — add a new industry palette to the theme system
- /db-status — show job counts by status and recent failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
